title: create procedure fails silently
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (ref_id INTEGER, value REAL CHECK (value >= 0), FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table1(id));
INSERT INTO test_table1 (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Sample Name');
SELECT * FROM test_table1 JOIN test_table2 ON test_table1.id = test_table2.ref_id WHERE test_table2.value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: create procedure fails silently on table creation
